headline: UnitedHealth, Humana Among Stocks Getting a Boost From Medicare Decision
summary: The Trump administration's decision to raise payments to Medicare insurers by 2.48% next year lifted a variety of health- and insurance-related stocks in afterhours trading Monday. To note:    UnitedHealth (UNH): The health insurer's stock, a major component of the Dow Jones Industrial Average, rose 8.

headline: UnitedHealth, Humana, Health Insurers Jump On Higher Medicare Advantage Payments
summary: Medicare Advantage payments will rise 2.5% in 2027, above estimates. That's good news for UnitedHealth, Humana and other health insurers.

raw.headline: UnitedHealth, Humana, Health Insurers Jump On Higher Medicare Advantage Payments

headline: Humana shares surge 12% on 2027 Medicare rate boost; UNH, CVS rally
summary: Investing.com -- Humana (NYSE:HUM) shares jumped 12% after hours Monday, while UnitedHealth (NYSE:UNH) and CVS Health (NYSE:CVS) gained 9%, and Elevance Health (NYSE:ELV) climbed 5% after Medicare finalized a 2.48% rate increase for private insurers in 2027.

headline: CNC Combines Its North Carolina Units to Expand Statewide Footprint
summary: Centene merges its North Carolina units into Carolina Complete Health and aims to streamline Medicaid operations while serving over 980,000 members statewide.

headline: Trump administration finalizes better-than-feared Medicare Advantage payment rate in boost to health insurers
summary: The Trump administration will increase average Medicare Advantage payments by 2.48%, or more than $13 billion, in 2027.

headline: Shares of health insurance companies are trading higher after the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services announced a 2.48% rate hike for 2027 Medicare Advantage and Part D programs.

headline: Centene Announces New Executive Leadership Structure
summary: Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC), a leading healthcare enterprise committed to helping people live healthier lives, today announced the creation of two new executive leadership positions, which will report to Chief Executive Officer Sarah London. Centene has hired Daniel Finke as Group President, Markets and Commercial, and appointed Michael Carson to Group President, Medicare and Specialty.

headline: Centene creates two new executive leadership roles
summary: It’s the latest in a flurry of executive appointments from health insurers looking to strengthen their leadership teams amid regulatory headwinds and elevated medical costs.
